basic_details.job_title: Deogarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deogarh District Court Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website deogarh.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the Deogarh District Court Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per Odisha District and Civil Courts' Judicial Staff Services Rules, 2008.

qualification.details: Jr. Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Jr. Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in type writing in English. Stenographer Gr.-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in type writing in English. Language Proficiency: Able to speak, read and write Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard for all posts.

salary_details.details: Jr. Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900-63,200 at Level-4 Jr. Typist: Rs. 19,900-63,200 at Level-4 Stenographer Gr.-III: Rs. 25,500-81,100 at Level-7

selection_process: Written Examination Type Writing / Shorthand & Type Writing Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Deogarh District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://deogarh.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Deogarh District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Deogarh District Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Jr. Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Jr. Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in type writing in English. Stenographer Gr.-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in type writing in English. Language Proficiency: Able to speak, read and write Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Deogarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Examination Type Writing / Shorthand & Type Writing Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva Voce Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Deogarh District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://deogarh.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Deogarh District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Deogarh District Court recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Deogarh District Court recruitment is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies released by the Deogarh District Court for Jr. Clerk-cum-Copyist, Jr. Typist, and Stenographer Gr.-III posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Specific typing and shorthand speeds are also required for certain posts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 81,100 per month, depending on the post and level.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Deogarh District Court recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Type Writing/Shorthand & Type Writing Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), and Viva Voce Test.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for these posts in offline mode only by sending their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of the Deogarh District Court?
faq.answer: The official website of the Deogarh District Court is https://deogarh.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Deogarh District Court recruitment is 03 August 2026.
